title: Level Designer
description: Design and implement engaging levels for a popular mobile game, focusing on player experience, pacing, and retention.
Collaborate with artists, developers, and product teams to ensure cohesive level design that aligns with overall game vision and quality standards.
Iterate on level designs based on player feedback and data analysis to optimize for fun and engagement.

title: Game Dev Team Lead
description: Led a development team to improve code quality, delivery consistency, and overall gameplay polish.
Owned onboarding and established workflows to support faster iteration and cross-discipline collaboration.
Managed Git repositories, PRs, and code reviews to maintain stability during iterative development.

title: Game Developer
description: Implemented and iterated on gameplay features in Phaser and Construct 2, focusing on moment-to-moment gameplay feel, clarity, and player retention.
Contributed to design reviews and provided feedback on content quality from a player experience perspective.
Developed and maintained client-side features using JavaScript and TypeScript.
Took ownership of features from design review through QA, collaborating with designers, QA, and product.

title: Unity Instructor
description: Provided structured critique on student game ideas and prototypes.
Guided students through level design, gameplay iteration, scripting, and debugging in Unity.
Optimized Unity projects and C# code to improve performance, stability, and iteration speed.
